rules.description: Window mode: ⌥Space → Hammerspoon windowSnap (one-shot: h/j/k/l halves, shift+h/j/k/l quarters (repeat toggles the pair), shift+space golden-ratio center, space=fill, u=undo, esc/q/2s exit). ⚠️ BROKEN? run window-mode-doctor + read ~/.config/karabiner/WINDOW-MODE.md

set_notification_message.text: ◆ WINDOW MODE   —   h ◧  l ◨  k ⬒  j ⬓   space = fill   (one-shot · esc/q exits)
◆ WINDOW MODE   —   h ◧  l ◨  k ⬒  j ⬓   space = fill   (one-shot · esc/q exits)

rules.description: Double tap left shift → Ctrl+A (Select All)
Double tap right shift → Toggle microphone mute (NOTE: /Users/ejfox/bin/mic-toggle is MISSING — errors until created or removed)
